summary: Iteration 44: Comprehensive verification of HelpCircle fix, Markdown rendering, and Legal Framework enhancements. All critical bugs reported by user are FIXED. No runtime errors on CaseDetail page.

issues: Minor React hydration warnings (span inside select/option) - not affecting functionality

critical_code_review_comments: HelpCircle import FIXED at CaseDetail.jsx line 9 - Help button now works without runtime error
ReportsSection.jsx uses ReactMarkdown with remarkGfm - reports render as formatted Markdown, not raw JSON
Report action buttons (Full Report Page, Barrister View, Export PDF, Print) positioned at TOP of expanded report (line 309)
CaseDetail has exactly 6 tabs: Documents, Timeline, Grounds, Notes, Reports, Legal
NO Contradictions or Progress tabs present
LegalFrameworkViewer has 'How to Start Your Appeal' section with 6 steps
LegalFrameworkViewer has 'Appeal Forms & Court Registries' with links for NSW, VIC, QLD, SA, WA
seed_data_creation: None required - used existing test user and case (case_9e57a5b899bf)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 44 verified: (1) HelpCircle fix - NO runtime errors on CaseDetail page, (2) Report Markdown rendering working with ReactMarkdown, (3) Report buttons at TOP of expanded card, (4) Legal Framework has 'How to Start Your Appeal' 6 steps and court registry links. Test user testuser999@test.com has case_9e57a5b899bf with one quick_summary report.

rca_of_the_issue.issue: HelpCircle runtime error - Can't find variable: HelpCircle
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: The HelpCircle icon was removed from the lucide-react import statement in CaseDetail.jsx while the Help button in the header still referenced it
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied: Added HelpCircle back to the import at line 9: import { ..., HelpCircle, ... } from 'lucide-react'
rca_of_the_issue.verification: Navigated to CaseDetail page after login - NO console errors, Help button renders correctly
